title: One Of Us Is Lying!
description: A client side modpack for the creators in One Of Us Is Lying
body:
10 creators, 2 lives each, each session a liar, accomplice and doctor are assigned. Their purposes? To kill, to assist, to save.
 
 This is a client modpack for the creators on the server to use

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QVBaHJLSuiw
